title: System Account Access Token
description: Schema of the system account access token.

id.description: ID of the system account access token.

name.description: Name of the system account access token.

created_at.description: Timestamp of when the system account access token was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp of when the system account access token was last updated.

expires_at.description: Timestamp of when the system account access token will expire.

last_used_at.description: Timestamp of when the system account access token was last used.
